languages.text: "Микош, разве тот, кто пожертвовал собой ради других, может быть без сердца? Может, оно бьется иначе, но оно бьется. Я верю в тебя, как и все, кого ты спас. А ты веришь?"
"Mikosh, can a person who sacrificed himself for others be without a heart? It may beat differently, but it does still beat. I believe in you, and everyone you saved believes in you too. Do you?"
languages.original_text: "Микош, разве тот, кто пожертвовал собой ради других, может быть без сердца? Может, оно бьется иначе, но оно бьется. Я верю в тебя, как и все, кого ты спас. А ты веришь?"

traits.locale_text: "Mikosh, can a person who sacrificed himself for others be without a heart? It may beat differently, but it does still beat. I believe in you, and everyone you saved believes in you too. Do you?"
"Mikosh, can a person who sacrificed himself for others be without a heart? It may beat differently, but it does still beat. I believe in you, and everyone you saved believes in you too. Do you?"
"Mikosh, can a person who sacrificed himself for others be without a heart? It may beat differently, but it does still beat. I believe in you, and everyone you saved believes in you too. Do you?"

languages.text: 「ミコシュ、他人のために命を捧げた人間が心を持たないとは考えられない。心は違うように動いているかもしれないが、それでも動いている。私は君を信じているし、君が救った人たちも君を信じている。君もそう思うか？」
languages.original_text: "Mikosh, can a person who sacrificed himself for others be without a heart? It may beat differently, but it does still beat. I believe in you, and everyone you saved believes in you too. Do you?"

traits.locale_text: 「ミコシュ、他人のために命を捧げた人間が心を持たないとは考えられない。心は違うように動いているかもしれないが、それでも動いている。私は君を信じているし、君が救った人たちも君を信じている。君もそう思うか？」

languages.text: “米科什，一个为了他人牺牲自我的人，怎么会没有心呢？它跳动的方式可能有所不同，但它同样在跳动。我相信你，你救下的所有人也都相信你。你相信自己吗？”
languages.original_text: "Mikosh, can a person who sacrificed himself for others be without a heart? It may beat differently, but it does still beat. I believe in you, and everyone you saved believes in you too. Do you?"

traits.locale_text: “米科什，一个为了他人牺牲自我的人，怎么会没有心呢？它跳动的方式可能有所不同，但它同样在跳动。我相信你，你救下的所有人也都相信你。你相信自己吗？”

languages.text: « Mikosh, une personne qui s'est sacrifiée pour les autres peut-elle vraiment être sans cœur ? Il bat toujours, même si son rythme vous paraît différent. Je crois en vous, comme tous ceux que vous avez sauvés. Et vous ? »
languages.original_text: "Mikosh, can a person who sacrificed himself for others be without a heart? It may beat differently, but it does still beat. I believe in you, and everyone you saved believes in you too. Do you?"

traits.locale_text: « Mikosh, une personne qui s'est sacrifiée pour les autres peut-elle vraiment être sans cœur ? Il bat toujours, même si son rythme vous paraît différent. Je crois en vous, comme tous ceux que vous avez sauvés. Et vous ? »

languages.text: «Mikosh, ¿cree que una persona que se ha sacrificado por otros puede no tener corazón? Es posible que lata de otra forma, pero late igualmente. Creo en usted, y todas las personas a las que ha salvado también. ¿Y usted?».
languages.original_text: "Mikosh, can a person who sacrificed himself for others be without a heart? It may beat differently, but it does still beat. I believe in you, and everyone you saved believes in you too. Do you?"

traits.locale_text: «Mikosh, ¿cree que una persona que se ha sacrificado por otros puede no tener corazón? Es posible que lata de otra forma, pero late igualmente. Creo en usted, y todas las personas a las que ha salvado también. ¿Y usted?».

languages.text: "Mikosh, başkaları için kendini feda eden bir insan kalpsiz olabilir mi? Kalbin farklı atıyor olabilir ama hâlâ atıyor. Ben sana inanıyorum, kurtardığın herkes de öyle. Sen inanıyor musun?"
languages.original_text: "Mikosh, can a person who sacrificed himself for others be without a heart? It may beat differently, but it does still beat. I believe in you, and everyone you saved believes in you too. Do you?"

traits.locale_text: "Mikosh, başkaları için kendini feda eden bir insan kalpsiz olabilir mi? Kalbin farklı atıyor olabilir ama hâlâ atıyor. Ben sana inanıyorum, kurtardığın herkes de öyle. Sen inanıyor musun?"

languages.text: "Mikosh, kann eine Person, die sich für andere opfert, herzlos sein? Es mag anders sein, aber es schlägt noch immer. Ich glaube an Euch ... genau wie alle, die Ihr gerettet habt. Und Ihr?"
languages.original_text: "Mikosh, can a person who sacrificed himself for others be without a heart? It may beat differently, but it does still beat. I believe in you, and everyone you saved believes in you too. Do you?"
